title: Branch Hours & Contact Directory
text:
Branch Hours & Contact Directory — 24/7 Emergency Line
1-800-555-0190 — Active water leaks, no heat below 40°F, no cooling above 95°F, electrical hazards.

title: Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
text:
Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
Fee schedule for customer cancellations, no-shows, and Meridian-initiated changes.

title: Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
text:
Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy — Standard Cancellation Fees
Notice Given Fee
More than 24 hours before appointment No fee
2 to 24 hours before appointment $35 late-cancel fee
Less than 2 hours or no-show $75 no-show fee (waived once per 12-month period per customer)

title: Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
text:
Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy — Rescheduling
More than 24 hours notice: free, unlimited reschedules.
Same-day reschedule: treated as a late-cancel if the new slot is not the same day.

title: Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
text:
Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy — Meridian-Initiated Cancellations
If Meridian cancels with less than 4 hours notice, customer receives a $25 credit toward their next booking.
Weather-related cancellations: no fee to customer; re-book at no charge.

title: Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
text:
Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy — Fee Disputes
Customers who dispute a cancellation fee must be escalated to the Branch Manager. Agents must NOT waive fees
unilaterally, except for the once-per-12-months first-time no-show waiver.

title: Electrical Pricing Bands
text:
Electrical Pricing Bands
Common electrical services. All prices in USD, labor only unless noted.

title: Electrical Pricing Bands
text:
Electrical Pricing Bands — Service Call Fee
$85 flat — waived when repair total exceeds $300.

title: Electrical Pricing Bands
text:
Electrical Pricing Bands — Common Services
Service Price Range
Outlet / switch replacement $95 – $175
GFCI / AFCI installation (per outlet) $120 – $200
Ceiling fan install (fixture supplied by customer) $150 – $250
Panel inspection + report $175 – $300
Circuit breaker replacement $200 – $400
Sub-panel installation $800 – $1,800
Full panel upgrade (100A to 200A) $1,800 – $3,500
EV charger — Level 2, NEMA 14-50 $450 – $900

title: FAQ — Booking & Scheduling
text:
FAQ — Booking & Scheduling
Answers to the most common questions about appointments, windows, and reminders.

title: FAQ — Booking & Scheduling
section: How far in advance can I book?
text:
FAQ — Booking & Scheduling — How far in advance can I book?
Up to 60 days. Same-day slots are available before 11 am for Gold and Platinum members, or before 9 am for
standard customers.

title: FAQ — Booking & Scheduling
section: Can I request a specific technician?
text:
FAQ — Booking & Scheduling — Can I request a specific technician?
Yes — use the preferred_tech field when booking. Availability is not guaranteed; the system will notify the customer if
the preferred tech is unavailable.

title: FAQ — Booking & Scheduling
section: How long does a typical visit take?
text:
FAQ — Booking & Scheduling — How long does a typical visit take?
Service Type Typical Duration
HVAC tune-up 60 – 90 min
HVAC diagnostic 45 – 60 min
Plumbing service call 60 – 120 min
Electrical inspection 60 – 90 min
Full system install 4 – 8 hours

title: FAQ — Booking & Scheduling
text:
FAQ — Booking & Scheduling — Will I get a reminder?
Yes — automated SMS and email reminders are sent 24 hours before the appointment and 30 minutes before the
technician departs.

title: FAQ — Booking & Scheduling
text:
FAQ — Booking & Scheduling — What is the appointment window?
All appointments use 2-hour windows (e.g., 10 am – 12 pm). The technician sends an ETA when en route.

title: FAQ — Emergencies & After-Hours
text:
FAQ — Emergencies & After-Hours
What qualifies as an emergency, how to request urgent service, and SLA targets.

title: FAQ — Emergencies & After-Hours
text:
FAQ — Emergencies & After-Hours — What Counts as an Emergency?
Active water leak or flooding
No heat when outdoor temperature is forecast below 40°F
No cooling when indoor temperature exceeds 95°F
Electrical hazard: burning smell, sparking, or partial power loss
Sewage backup
How to Request Emergency Service
Call 1-800-555-0190 (24/7). Do NOT use the web booking portal for emergencies — response is not guaranteed
through that channel.
Emergency Response Time SLA
Member Tier Target ETA
Platinum 2 hours or less
Gold 3 hours or less
Silver / Non-member 4 hours or less (best effort)
After-Hours Surcharges
See the HVAC and Plumbing pricing documents for full surcharge details. Emergency dispatch fees ($99 plumbing,
$89 HVAC) are not waived for after-hours calls.

title: FAQ — Payments & Invoicing
text:
FAQ — Payments & Invoicing
Payment methods, estimates, financing, and invoice dispute process.

title: FAQ — Payments & Invoicing
text:
FAQ — Payments & Invoicing — When do I pay?
Payment is due at completion of service. The technician processes payment on-site via card, tap-to-pay, or check.
Net-30 invoicing is available for commercial accounts only.

title: FAQ — Payments & Invoicing
section: What payment methods do you accept?
text:
FAQ — Payments & Invoicing — What payment methods do you accept?
Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover · Apple Pay / Google Pay · Personal check (residential) or business check
(commercial) · Zelle (residential customers only, up to $500) · Cash (discouraged — technician may not carry
change).

title: FAQ — Payments & Invoicing
section: Can I get an estimate before the visit?
text:
FAQ — Payments & Invoicing — Can I get an estimate before the visit?
Phone estimates are ballpark only, based on pricing bands. Written estimates are provided on-site after the
diagnostic. Customer must approve before work begins.

title: FAQ — Payments & Invoicing
text:
FAQ — Payments & Invoicing — Is financing available?
Yes — for jobs over $1,000 via GreenSky. 0% for 12 months with approved credit. Apply online or on-site with the
technician.

title: FAQ — Payments & Invoicing
section: How do I dispute an invoice?
text:
FAQ — Payments & Invoicing — How do I dispute an invoice?
Email billing@meridian-home.com within 30 days of the service date. The billing team responds within 2 business
days.

title: HVAC Pricing Bands
text:
HVAC Pricing Bands
Ballpark pricing for diagnostics, repairs, and maintenance plans. All prices in USD.

title: HVAC Pricing Bands
text:
HVAC Pricing Bands — Diagnostic Fee
$89 flat — waived when repair is booked on the same day.

title: HVAC Pricing Bands
text:
HVAC Pricing Bands — Repair Tiers
Tier Description Price Range
T1 Minor (filter swap, thermostat calibration, capacitor) $95 – $250
T2 Moderate (fan motor, contactor, refrigerant top-up £2 lb) $250 – $650
T3 Major (compressor, coil, refrigerant >2 lb, ductwork section) $650 – $2,400
T4 Full system replacement — refer to Sales for quoted scope Quote required

title: HVAC Pricing Bands
text:
HVAC Pricing Bands — Maintenance Plans
Plan Annual Fee Includes
Silver $149 / yr 1× tune-up, 10% repair discount
Gold $249 / yr 2× tune-ups, 15% repair discount, priority scheduling
Platinum $399 / yr Unlimited tune-ups, 20% discount, same-day priority, free T1 repairs

title: HVAC Pricing Bands
text:
HVAC Pricing Bands — After-Hours Surcharge
+$75 for calls before 7 am or after 6 pm Monday–Saturday.
+$125 on Sundays and federal holidays.

title: Plumbing Pricing Bands
text:
Plumbing Pricing Bands
Common plumbing services and emergency dispatch pricing.

title: Plumbing Pricing Bands
text:
Plumbing Pricing Bands — Service Call Fee
$75 flat — applied toward any repair over $200 booked on the same visit.

title: Plumbing Pricing Bands
text:
Plumbing Pricing Bands — Common Services
Service Price Range Notes
Drain clearing (standard) $120 – $200 Hydro-jet add $95
Faucet / fixture replacement $150 – $350 Parts extra if customer-supplied excluded
Toilet repair / replace $175 – $450 Parts included for standard models
Water heater replacement (40 gal) $950 – $1,400 Tankless: quote required
Slab/pipe leak detection $300 – $500 Camera inspection extra $150
Main shutoff / PRV replacement $400 – $750 Permit may be required

title: Plumbing Pricing Bands
text:
Plumbing Pricing Bands — Emergency Plumbing (Active Water Leak)
Flat $99 emergency dispatch fee. After-hours surcharges same as HVAC policy.

title: Warranty & Guarantee Terms
text:
Warranty & Guarantee Terms
Labor and parts warranties for residential and commercial customers.

title: Warranty & Guarantee Terms
text:
Warranty & Guarantee Terms — Labor Warranty
All labor: 90-day warranty from date of service, no charge to return.
Major installs (water heater, furnace, AC unit, panel upgrade): 1-year labor warranty.

title: Warranty & Guarantee Terms
text:
Warranty & Guarantee Terms — Parts Warranty
Meridian-supplied parts: passed-through manufacturer warranty (typically 1–5 years).
Customer-supplied parts: no Meridian warranty on parts; labor warranty still applies.

title: Warranty & Guarantee Terms
text:
Warranty & Guarantee Terms — Maintenance Plan Members
Plan Labor Warranty Extension T1 Repairs
Silver Standard 90 days Not covered
Gold Extended to 1 year on all repairs Not covered
Platinum Extended to 1 year on all repairs Covered at no charge

title: Warranty & Guarantee Terms
text:
Warranty & Guarantee Terms — Exclusions
Damage from misuse, flooding, fire, freeze, or acts of God.
Pest-related damage.
Issues arising from customer alterations made after service.

title: Warranty & Guarantee Terms
text:
Warranty & Guarantee Terms — Claim Process
Customer calls or emails to initiate a warranty claim. Agent creates a Warranty Return job in the Booking system with
job_type = 'warranty_return'. No diagnostic fee is charged for warranty visits.
